items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

This is a **migration tracking issue** for migrating `Azure.ResourceManager.KubernetesConfiguration` from Swagger/AutoRest generation to TypeSpec-based generation using the Azure Management Plane Generator (MPG). It is a sub-issue of the parent tracking issue [#53864 — Azure Mgmt Generator migration](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864).

**Current SDK state:** `sdk/kubernetesconfiguration/Azure.ResourceManager.KubernetesConfiguration` — version `1.3.0-beta.1`, last GA `1.2.0`, currently generated via AutoRest (`autorest.md`), with ~22 generated files.

---

<details>
<summary>📦 Package & Spec Context</summary>

- **SDK path:** `sdk/kubernetesconfiguration/Azure.ResourceManager.KubernetesConfiguration`
- **Current generation:** AutoRest via `autorest.md` referencing [azure-rest-api-specs kubernetesconfiguration](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/tree/main/specification/kubernetesconfiguration/resource-manager)
- **Current version:** `1.3.0-beta.1` (GA: `1.2.0`)
- **Service label in CODEOWNERS:** `%Kubernetes Configuration` — ServiceOwners: `@NarayanThiru`
- **Parent issue:** #53864

</details>

<details>
<summary>✅ Migration Checklist</summary>

- [ ] Verify TypeSpec specs exist for `kubernetesconfiguration` in [azure-rest-api-specs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/tree/main/specification/kubernetesconfiguration)
- [ ] Create/update `tsp-location.yaml` in `sdk/kubernetesconfiguration/Azure.ResourceManager.KubernetesConfiguration`
- [ ] Run MPG to generate the SDK from TypeSpec: `npx tsp-client update` or use `azsdk_package_generate_code` MCP tool
- [ ] Build the SDK and resolve any compilation errors (`dotnet build`)
- [ ] Run breaking change analysis (the `ApiCompatVersion` is set to `1.2.0`)
- [ ] Address any breaking changes using SDK-side customizations or TypeSpec decorators (see [mitigate-breaking-changes skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/SKILL.md))
- [ ] Export and update public API listings: `pwsh eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 kubernetesconfiguration`
- [ ] Remove `autorest.md` once TypeSpec generation is confirmed working
- [ ] Run pre-commit checks before committing

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔗 Helpful Resources</summary>

- [MPG Migration Skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/SKILL.md) — Automated migration workflow
- [Mitigate Breaking Changes Skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/SKILL.md) — Patterns for handling breaking changes
- [Pre-commit Checks Skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/pre-commit-checks/SKILL.md)
- [Local SDK Generation Workflow](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/eng/common/instructions/azsdk-tools/local-sdk-workflow.instructions.md)
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [kubernetesconfiguration REST API specs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/tree/main/specification/kubernetesconfiguration/resource-manager)

</details>

<details>
<summary>💡 Notes & Nudges</summary>

- Check if TypeSpec specs are available and complete for all resource types in this service before starting — incomplete specs will require spec contributions first.
- Watch for potential breaking changes since `ApiCompatVersion` is `1.2.0` (GA). Use `CodeGenSuppress`, `CodeGenType`, `@`@clientName``, or `@`@alternateType`` decorators to mitigate any incompatibilities.
- The `enable-wire-path-attribute: true` emitter option may be needed in `tspconfig.yaml` if the existing SDK already uses `WirePathAttribute`.
- The `mpg-sdk-migration` Copilot skill can automate most of this migration end-to-end.

</details>
